summary: Machine-readable function / export map — initial pass for key modules, services, composables, utils and task components.

entries.description: Global registry for cross-cutting services. Use `registerAppService(name, svc)` and `app(name)` to access services via a safe proxy.
notes: Proxy wraps async functions and returns undefined on throw
Used to register 'storage' in day-organiser root

entries.description: Constructs and exposes domain APIs for day-organiser. Registers `storage` into `appService`.
notes: Constructors call construct() functions from modules/task and modules/group
Important import target for UI components

entries.description: Group domain API factory. Returns a small API object (add/update/delete/list/active).
notes: Recommended refactor target: extract persistence adapter

entries.summary: Machine-readable function / export map — expanded with members for exported objects (services, domain APIs, composables, utils, electron).

entries.description: Global registry for cross-cutting services. Use `registerAppService(name, svc)` and `app(name)` to access services via a safe proxy.

members.app(name): return Proxy around service: methods are wrapped to catch errors and return undefined

notes: Proxy wraps async functions and returns undefined on throw
Used to register 'storage' in day-organiser root

entries.description: Constructs and exposes domain APIs for day-organiser. Registers `storage` into `appService`.
notes: Constructors call construct() functions from modules/task and modules/group
Important import target for UI components

entries.description: Group domain API factory. Returns a small API object with add/update/delete, list helpers and active controls.
notes: API shape is intentionally small to simplify component usage

entries.description: Task domain API: `ApiTask` class and `construct(groupApi)` factory. Exposes time API, task list helpers, active selection and mutation methods.

class ApiTask.constructor(groupApi?): initialize state, time manager and TaskManager

get active() -> object.setMode(m): set mode and clear activeTask when switching to 'add'

get list() -> object.all(): return shallow copy of all tasks

get subtaskLine() -> object.add(text): add subtask line; persists via saveData() on success

get status() -> object.undoCycleDone(date, id): undo cycle done and saveData() if changed

notes: TaskManager handles heavy-lifting; ApiTask exposes a safe surface for components

entries.description: Storage API: loadData / saveData / import/export helpers. Bridges backend storage adapter (index.ts) and refactored API refs.

construct(groupApi?, timeApi?) -> object.loadData(): async: load from backendStorage or sample data, populate groupApi and timeApi refs
construct(groupApi?, timeApi?) -> object.saveData(data?): async: build payload from timeApi.days and groupApi then call backendStorage.saveData

notes: While loading, watchers suppress persistence writes
Transforms groups/tasks shape for backward compatibility

entries.description: Thin helper that calls `app('storage')?.saveData()`; used across modules to persist changes.
Project logger; only `error` forwards to console in production-friendly wrapper.
UI composable for long-press behaviour (start/cancel/set handler).

useLongPress() -> object.startLongPress(task, ev?): start timer and call handler after LONG_PRESS_MS

entries.description: View helper combining `useClock` and `useTimeDiff` for UI date displays.
Floating preview placement and focus handling helper used by preview components.
Provides `getTimeDifferenceDisplay` and `getTimeDiffClass` for relative date text and styling.
Task-related Vue components (default export = Vue component). Large components are candidates for extracting composables/services.
notes: Prefer moving non-template logic into `src/composables/` or `src/modules/task` when refactoring

entries.description: Electron main process entry: window creation, IPC handlers and lifecycle.

members.createWindow(): create BrowserWindow, set preload, inject APP_VERSION and APP_NAME
ipc handlers: dialog:select-folder: shows folder chooser and returns selected path or null
export:zip(folder, filename, jsonString): creates zip with JSON and returns zip path

notes: IPC handlers are used by renderer via preload; see src-electron/electron-preload.js
